unresolved_same_name.name: oil_price

evidence_refs.quote: higher crude oil prices raised our distribution fuel costs
crude oil price increases pushed jet fuel and diesel costs higher
rising crude oil prices lifted our freight and shipping costs

unresolved_same_name.why: SAME union refuted by skeptic (fail-close): All three refs (AAA evA4, BBB evB4, DDD evC3) name the same reusable cause: the market crude oil price rising as a fuel-cost input. Object/metric identical (crude oil price), scope identical (global commodity price, no narrowing), mechanism identical (higher oil price -> higher fuel/freight costs; the specific cost line affected is downstream evidence, not the driver). Matches DriverOntology R5's canonical familiar name oil_price.
